estimand_scope.fixed_cohort: The point estimate is the median paired station-RMSE difference among reportable stations in the frozen availability-enriched cohort. It is descriptive for those fixed stations and observable keys.
estimand_scope.not_claimed: It is not a probability-sample estimate for every US river, every HUC2 region, or every calendar day.
estimand_scope.superpopulation: Any HUC2 bootstrap, sign-flip, confidence-interval, p-value, or Holm interpretation is conditional on an explicit exchangeable-cluster superpopulation and the frozen assumptions below.

inference_scope.exact_enumeration_limit: Exact enumeration removes Monte-Carlo error only; it does not establish the null symmetry, independent-cluster sampling, or a general composite median null.
inference_scope.small_cluster_rule: The already-declared NO_STRONG_INFERENCE diagnostics are promoted to a claim-blocking gate, with n_clusters >= 30, effective_cluster_fraction >= 0.75, and largest_cluster_share < 0.25 required before inferential wording can be considered.
inference_scope.null_simulation_role: Synthetic null simulation is falsification-only and cannot establish unobserved structural assumptions. Missing, not-run, or failed simulation evidence fails closed.

decision_overlay.allowed_failed_gate_wording: Report the fixed-cohort effect and label HUC2 bootstrap/sign-flip/Holm values only as assumption-conditional sensitivities; do not claim superiority, non-inferiority, equivalence, parity, or superpopulation confirmation.
